LanguageData.VEF_Beastmastery.description: Train and attune this animal to your will, granting direct control over their movements and actions through a powerful bond of dominance and trust.
LanguageData.VEF_Beastmastery.label: beastmastery
LanguageData.VEF_ControlledBlinking.description: Override the creature's usual erratic blinking, allowing a directed way to blink to a chosen location within range.
LanguageData.VEF_ControlledBlinking.label: controlled blinking
LanguageData.VEF_ControlledCorpseDecay.description: Teach the animal to control its corpse decaying abilities.
LanguageData.VEF_ControlledCorpseDecay.label: controlled corpse decay
LanguageData.VEF_ControlledDetonation.description: The animal can willingly trigger a powerful self-destructive explosion, sacrificing itself in a final act that unleashes all stored volatile compounds in a devastating blast.
LanguageData.VEF_ControlledDetonation.label: controlled detonation
LanguageData.VEF_ControlledInvisibility.description: The animal can willingly shroud itself in a veil of controlled invisibility, vanishing from sight while retaining full awareness and precision.
LanguageData.VEF_ControlledInvisibility.label: controlled invisibility
LanguageData.VEF_CycleSeverance.description: Suppress the natural reproduction cycle, preventing the release of offspring and completely negating the creature’s asexual reproduction.
LanguageData.VEF_CycleSeverance.label: cycle severance
LanguageData.VEF_DiggingDiscipline.description: Teach the animal to control its terrain digging abilities.
LanguageData.VEF_DiggingDiscipline.label: digging discipline
LanguageData.VEF_FumeRegulation.description: Teach the animal to control its gas production abilities.
LanguageData.VEF_FumeRegulation.label: fume regulation
